title: VR Combat
description: Compatibility between Vivecraft and Better Combat.
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977751810922131456/1133436566744858644/vr_combat.png)
 
# ABOUT
VR Combat adds compatibility between Vivecraft and Better Combat.
Allowing VR & Non-VR players to play along without issues, by overriding the combat just for VR users.


Requires Vivecraft and Better Combat
